scripts.build: esbuild src/background/background.ts src/content.ts src/injected/nextRouterBridge.ts src/injected/fetchHook.ts src/injected/xhrHook.ts --bundle --outdir=dist --format=esm --target=es2020 --sourcemap=inline
scripts.build:watch: esbuild src/background/background.ts src/content.ts src/injected/nextRouterBridge.ts src/injected/fetchHook.ts src/injected/xhrHook.ts --bundle --outdir=dist --format=esm --target=es2020 --sourcemap=inline --watch
